hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=volunteer-project
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
[ ! -d "$repo/.git" ] || fail "This folder should not be initialized yet."
[ -f "$repo/README.md" ] || fail "The expected file README.md is missing."
[ "$(cat "$repo/README.md")" = '# Volunteer Project

Volunteer coordination notes.' ] || fail "The content of README.md is not correct yet."
[ -f "$repo/assignments.txt" ] || fail "The expected file assignments.txt is missing."
[ "$(cat "$repo/assignments.txt")" = 'Volunteer assignments

Welcome table: Sam
Training desk: unassigned' ] || fail "The content of assignments.txt is not correct yet."

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=volunteer-project
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is on the wrong branch."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 0 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -z "$(git -C "$repo" config --local --get user.name || true)" ] || fail "An author name was configured too early."
[ -z "$(git -C "$repo" config --local --get user.email || true)" ] || fail "An author email was configured too early."
actual_status=$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain=v1 --untracked-files=all)
[ "$actual_status" = '?? README.md
?? assignments.txt' ] || fail "The staged, unstaged, or untracked state is not correct yet."
actual_tracked=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files)
[ "$actual_tracked" = '' ] || fail "The tracked file set is not correct yet."
[ -f "$repo/README.md" ] || fail "The expected file README.md is missing."
[ "$(cat "$repo/README.md")" = '# Volunteer Project

Volunteer coordination notes.' ] || fail "The content of README.md is not correct yet."
[ -f "$repo/assignments.txt" ] || fail "The expected file assignments.txt is missing."
[ "$(cat "$repo/assignments.txt")" = 'Volunteer assignments

Welcome table: Sam
Training desk: unassigned' ] || fail "The content of assignments.txt is not correct yet."

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -eu
rm -rf -- volunteer-project
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
git -C volunteer-project init -q -b main
find volunteer-project -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 ! -name .git -exec rm -rf -- {} +
find volunteer-project -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 ! -name .git -exec rm -rf -- {} +
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
printf %s '# Volunteer Project

Volunteer coordination notes.
' > volunteer-project/README.md
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
printf %s 'Volunteer assignments

' > volunteer-project/assignments.txt

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=volunteer-project
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is on the wrong branch."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 1 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" config --local --get user.name)" = 'ZoeSkoul Learner' ] || fail "The repository-local author name is incorrect."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" config --local --get user.email)" = learner@zoeskoul.local ] || fail "The repository-local author email is incorrect."
actual_status=$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain=v1 --untracked-files=all)
[ "$actual_status" = '' ] || fail "The staged, unstaged, or untracked state is not correct yet."
actual_tracked=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files)
[ "$actual_tracked" = 'README.md
assignments.txt' ] || fail "The tracked file set is not correct yet."
actual_subjects=$(git -C "$repo" log --format=%s --reverse)
[ "$actual_subjects" = 'Start volunteer project' ] || fail "The commit history does not match the required project story."
[ -f "$repo/README.md" ] || fail "The expected file README.md is missing."
[ "$(cat "$repo/README.md")" = '# Volunteer Project

Volunteer coordination notes.' ] || fail "The content of README.md is not correct yet."
[ -f "$repo/assignments.txt" ] || fail "The expected file assignments.txt is missing."
[ "$(cat "$repo/assignments.txt")" = 'Volunteer assignments

Identify the complete untracked file set before staging
Stage a deliberate first snapshot and verify the first commit
